name: Togai
description: Togai — Usage-based and hybrid billing platform for SaaS with real-time metering, custom pricing, and revenue reporting.

seo.title: Togai — Subscription Billing
seo.meta_description: Togai: Togai — Usage-based and hybrid billing platform for SaaS with real-time metering, custom pricing, and revenue reporting.

when_to_use: Usage-based billing with real-time metering for SaaS APIs
Custom pricing plan configuration for hybrid subscription models
Revenue reporting and usage analytics for developer tools

pros: Real-time metering with flexible pricing models
Strong fit for SaaS moving from flat to usage pricing
Lower cost entry point than enterprise rivals
cons: Requires engineering effort to model correctly
review.verdict: A lean usage-billing option for SaaS experimenting with hybrid pricing without enterprise overhead.
review.best_for: Growing SaaS introducing usage or hybrid pricing that want developer-friendly metering.
review.not_for: Large enterprises with regulatory rev rec needs or flat-rate products without metering.
